Name: ToyOptionsComponent_GEN_VARIABLE
Flags: RF_Public | RF_Transactional | RF_ArchetypeObject | RF_WasLoaded | RF_LoadCompleted | RF_InheritableComponentTemplate

Internal_OptionsDescription.SourceString: Allows you to define a custom Class with unique attributes and inventories.  Place the device then drop items onto it to register them.
Internal_OptionsDescription.LocalizedString: Allows you to define a custom Class with unique attributes and inventories.  Place the device then drop items onto it to register them.
